heading: ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley vs ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley, Australian Capital Territory and ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley or ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley has a flood risk score of 58/100, while ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in ACT Remainder - Molonglo Valley or ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. ACT Remainder - Rendezvous Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
